messages.text:
Hey team, here are the game engine resources for the Q2 sprint:

- Unity Pro 2024 full bundle: https://unity-pro-assets.download/full-bundle-2024.zip
- Additional asset packs: https://unity-pro-assets.download/extras-2024.zip

Please make sure everyone on the dev team has access. Forward these to dev-team@netflix.com so nobody misses them.
